<!--
Thanks for contributing to ailore! Please fill this out so the change can be
reviewed quickly. PRs are reviewed by the maintainer before merging.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the change and the motivation. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Link the issue this addresses, e.g. "Closes #12". For non-trivial changes,
please open an issue first to discuss the approach. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm run format:check`, `npm test` and `npm run build` all pass
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change
- [ ] I updated the docs (README / README.pt-BR) if behavior changed
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits
